chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 113 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 21.11.2025. Ms. Shamim Mughal, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. = This Revision was presented on 29.04.2022 and when the same was admitted none were present on behalf of the applicant on the said date. Subsequently, the matter was listed atleast on three occasions and none were present on behalf of the applicant. In the year 2022 counsel appeared on 02.09.2022 and on 12.09.2022 thereafter, none were present on behalf of the applicant for the remaining dates of hearing in the year 2022. Today once again none are present on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. It appears that the applicant has lost his interest in pursuing this Revision Application which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Tufail
